title: Projects
subtitle: Organize your meeting recordings by project
archivedAppearHere: Projects you archive will appear here.
createFirstDescription: Create your first project to start organizing your meeting recordings.
projectDetailsDescription: Update your project name, description, and team assignment. Changing the team controls who can access this project and its recordings.
projectTemplatesDescription: Define project-specific guidelines that will be included in AI responses. These instructions will help shape how the AI assistant responds to queries about this project.
uploadSubtitle: Upload a file or record live for {name}
uploadProcessingNote: After uploading, your recording will be automatically transcribed with AI analysis to generate action items and summaries.
createNewProjectDescription: Create a new project to organize your meeting recordings.
createProjectError: Failed to create project. Please try again.
editProjectDescription: Update your project information. Changes will be reflected immediately.
archiveDescription: This will archive {name}. Archived projects won't appear in your main project list, but all recordings will remain accessible via the Archived Projects view.
unarchiveDescription: This will restore {name} and make it active again. All recordings will remain accessible.
deleteCannotUndo: This action CANNOT be undone. This will permanently delete:
deleteRecordingsItem: {count} {count, plural, one {recording} other {recordings}} and all associated files
deleteActionItems: All extracted action items and tasks
deleteConfirmLabel: Type DELETE or the exact project name to confirm:
deleteCheckboxLabel: I understand that {count} {count, plural, one {recording} other {recordings}} and all associated data will be permanently deleted
deleteConfirmError: Please type "DELETE" or the exact project name to confirm deletion
deleteCheckboxError: You must confirm that you understand the consequences
recordingsWillBeRemoved: {count} {count, plural, one {recording} other {recordings}} will be removed from storage
projectInstructionsPlaceholder: Enter project-specific guidelines and instructions for the AI. These will be included in chat responses to help guide AI behavior for this project.
knowledgeContextDocuments: {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} providing context
knowledgeContextDescription: These documents provide context for AI transcriptions and summaries in this project.
